message:
Running command: # All paths fixed. Do a dry-run validation with JsonHeader step before resuming
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --last-run \
    --only Yosys.JsonHeader \
    config.json 2>&1 | tail -15
